SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE weekday(event_date) = 0;
SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE weekday(event_date) BETWEEN 0 AND 3;
SELECT event_date, weekday(event_date) AS day FROM test_dates ORDER BY day DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE weekday(event_date) = 6) AS weekend_dates;
SELECT td.event_date, weekday(td.event_date) FROM test_dates td JOIN holidays h ON td.event_date = h.holiday_date;
SELECT td.event_date, weekday(td.event_date) AS weekday FROM test_dates td WHERE weekday(td.event_date) IN (SELECT weekday(holiday_date) FROM holidays);
WITH week_days AS (SELECT event_date, weekday(event_date) AS wd FROM test_dates) SELECT wd, COUNT(wd) AS count FROM week_days GROUP BY wd ORDER BY wd;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE weekday(event_date) = (SELECT MAX(weekday(event_date)) FROM test_dates);
SELECT weekday(DATE '1900-01-01') AS weekday_start, weekday(DATE '2100-12-31') AS weekday_end;
